title: Apple’s New Siri AI Is Now Gemini
summary: Apple rebuilt Siri with personal context awareness, screen awareness, Visual Intelligence, writing tools, and cross-device conversation support at WWDC 2026. The new Siri is powered by Google Gemini integration and will initially launch only in select markets due to EU regulatory constraints.
writeup: The video covers Apple's WWDC 2026 reveal of a rebuilt Siri, reportedly powered by Google Gemini, with personal context, screen awareness, Visual Intelligence, writing tools, and cross-device conversations integrated across Apple devices. The Gemini tie-up matters because it marks Apple leaning on an external model for its core assistant rather than shipping its own. Key takeaways: Apple shares fell after the keynote, and the EU launch faces delays attributed to regulatory constraints.
